End-to-end test of the market context entry gate workflow. Run all 3 phases: gather market data and pending BUY order detail, classify regime and apply entry gate logic, then verify the report.

**Active positions:** 9 tickers (APLD, CIFR, CLSK, INTC, IONQ, NU, STIM, UAMY, USAR)
**Tool errors:** None

- Regime: **Risk-On** — 2/3 indices above 50-SMA, VIX 19.1 (declining 5D)
- QQQ is the sole index below 50-SMA
- Leading: Comm Services (+1.44%), Cons Cyclical (+1.04%)
- Lagging: Healthcare (-0.28%), Energy (-0.54%)

**Notable pending BUY proximity:**
- SOUN $7.63 Bullet 1: 2.4% away; $7.53 Bullet 2: 3.7% away
- STIM $1.25 Reserve 1: 3.1% away
- LUNR $17.16 Bullet 1: 2.2% away
- NNE $24.03 Bullet 1: 2.3% away
- ACHR $6.55 Bullet 1: 5.5% away
- CIFR $14.10 Bullet 3: 3.8% away

Ready for market context analysis.
